question: The scatterplot shows annual earnings for individuals at various ages. Based on what can be clearly seen in this chart, which statement is most appropriate?

options.A: Individuals in their late 50s clearly earn more than those in their early 40s.
options.B: Individuals in their early 40s clearly earn more than those in their late 50s.
options.C: Several age groups appear to have similar earnings, and the chart is too small to reliably tell which ages earn the most.
options.D: Individuals in their early 30s clearly earn the least among all ages shown.

explanation: The individuals in the chart between the ages of 52 and 58 have the highest annual. The small size of the chart may cause difficulty in accurately identifying the specific trends of annual in certain age ranges.
